import re
from pathlib import Path

def extract_funcs(text):
    # Captures free function names for inline/normal helpers. Good enough for parity reporting.
    pat = re.compile(r'(?m)"'^'"\\s*(?:(?:\\[\\[nodiscard\\]\\]\\s*)?(?:NWB_INLINE|inline)\\s+|_Use_decl_annotations_\\s*\\n\\s*inline\\s+)(?:[\\w:<>&*\\[\\]\\s]+?\\s+)?(?:MathCallConv\\s+)?([A-Za-z_]\\w*)\\s*\\(')
    names=[]
    for m in pat.finditer(text):
        n=m.group(1)
        if n not in names:
            names.append(n)
    return names

matrix_math = Path('global/matrix_math.h').read_text(errors='ignore')
math_h = Path('global/math.h').read_text(errors='ignore')
source_double = Path('global/detail/source_math/source_math_double.inl').read_text(errors='ignore')
source_float = ''.join(Path(p).read_text(errors='ignore') for p in [
    'global/detail/source_math/source_math_convert.inl',
    'global/detail/source_math/source_math_vector.inl',
    'global/detail/source_math/source_math_matrix.inl',
    'global/detail/source_math/source_math_misc.inl',
])

mm_names = extract_funcs(matrix_math)
mm_set = set(mm_names)
# Only map the float facade wrappers that this file actually exposes as high-level math API.
map_prefixes = [
    ('Vector', 'DoubleSimdVector'),
    ('Matrix', 'DoubleSimdMatrix'),
    ('Quaternion', 'DoubleSimdQuaternion'),
    ('Plane', 'DoubleSimdPlane'),
    ('LoadFloat', 'LoadDouble'),
    ('StoreFloat', 'StoreDouble'),
]
missing=[]
mapped=[]
for n in mm_names:
    if n.startswith('Double') or n.startswith('DoubleSimd'):
        continue
    # Skip non-float data helpers and private-ish aliases not intended for a double surface.
    target=None
    for a,b in map_prefixes:
        if n.startswith(a):
            target=b+n[len(a):]
            break
    if target:
        mapped.append((n,target))
        if target not in mm_set:
            missing.append((n,target))

# SourceMath implementation parity for the functions that the double facade calls.
source_names = extract_funcs(source_double)
source_set = set(source_names)
called = sorted(set(re.findall(r'SourceMath::(Double[A-Za-z0-9_]+|LoadDouble[A-Za-z0-9_]*|StoreDouble[A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(', matrix_math)))
missing_source_calls=[n for n in called if n not in source_set]

# Backend F32/F64 parity.
backend_missing=[]
for backend in ['global/detail/math_backend_scalar.h','global/detail/math_backend_avx2.h','global/detail/math_backend_neon.h']:
    text=Path(backend).read_text(errors='ignore')
    names=extract_funcs(text)
    s=set(names)
    f32=sorted(n for n in s if n.endswith('F32'))
    missing_f64=[]
    for n in f32:
        d=n[:-3]+'F64'
        if d not in s:
            missing_f64.append((n,d))
    backend_missing.append((backend, len(f32), missing_f64))

# SourceMath float -> double targeted surface. This intentionally excludes float-only integer/color/trig/estimation APIs.
source_float_names=extract_funcs(source_float)
source_float_set=set(source_float_names)
source_target_prefixes=[
    ('LoadFloat','LoadDouble'),('StoreFloat','StoreDouble'),('Vector2Transform','DoubleVector2Transform'),('Vector3Transform','DoubleVector3Transform'),('Vector4Transform','DoubleVector4Transform'),
    ('Vector2Dot','DoubleVector2Dot'),('Vector2Cross','DoubleVector2Cross'),('Vector2LengthSq','DoubleVector2LengthSq'),('Vector2Length','DoubleVector2Length'),('Vector2Normalize','DoubleVector2Normalize'),
    ('Vector3Dot','DoubleVector3Dot'),('Vector3Cross','DoubleVector3Cross'),('Vector3LengthSq','DoubleVector3LengthSq'),('Vector3Length','DoubleVector3Length'),('Vector3Normalize','DoubleVector3Normalize'),
    ('Vector4Dot','DoubleVector4Dot'),('Vector4LengthSq','DoubleVector4LengthSq'),('Vector4Length','DoubleVector4Length'),('Vector4Normalize','DoubleVector4Normalize'),
    ('VectorZero','DoubleVectorZero'),('VectorSet','DoubleVectorSet'),('VectorReplicate','DoubleVectorReplicate'),('VectorSplatX','DoubleVectorSplatX'),('VectorSplatY','DoubleVectorSplatY'),('VectorSplatZ','DoubleVectorSplatZ'),('VectorSplatW','DoubleVectorSplatW'),
    ('VectorGetByIndex','DoubleVectorGetByIndex'),('VectorGetX','DoubleVectorGetX'),('VectorGetY','DoubleVectorGetY'),('VectorGetZ','DoubleVectorGetZ'),('VectorGetW','DoubleVectorGetW'),
    ('VectorNegate','DoubleVectorNegate'),('VectorAdd','DoubleVectorAdd'),('VectorSubtract','DoubleVectorSubtract'),('VectorMultiply','DoubleVectorMultiply'),('VectorMultiplyAdd','DoubleVectorMultiplyAdd'),('VectorDivide','DoubleVectorDivide'),('VectorScale','DoubleVectorScale'),('VectorSqrt','DoubleVectorSqrt'),('VectorAbs','DoubleVectorAbs'),
    ('Matrix','DoubleMatrix'),('Quaternion','DoubleQuaternion'),('PlaneDot','DoublePlaneDot'),('PlaneNormalize','DoublePlaneNormalize'),('PlaneTransform','DoublePlaneTransform'),
    ('BuildProjectTransformColumns','BuildDoubleProjectTransformColumns'),
]
# Build expected only when exact float function exists.
expected=[]
for f,d in source_target_prefixes:
    if f in source_float_set:
        expected.append((f,d))
# Add stream/project explicit expected where the source names include them.
for f in source_float_names:
    for prefix, dprefix in [('Vector2Transform','DoubleVector2Transform'),('Vector3Transform','DoubleVector3Transform'),('Vector4Transform','DoubleVector4Transform'),('PlaneTransform','DoublePlaneTransform')]:
        if f.startswith(prefix) and f.endswith('Stream'):
            expected.append((f, dprefix+f[len(prefix):]))
for f in ['Vector3Project','Vector3Unproject']:
    if f in source_float_set:
        expected.append((f,'Double'+f))
for f in ['Vector3ProjectStream','Vector3UnprojectStream']:
    if f in source_float_set:
        expected.append((f,'Double'+f))
# Deduplicate preserving order.
seen=set(); exp=[]
for item in expected:
    if item not in seen:
        seen.add(item); exp.append(item)
source_missing=[(f,d) for f,d in exp if d not in source_set]

# Direct unresolved Double* call names inside double inl: calls to Double* that are neither definitions nor constructors/types/locals.
double_calls=sorted(set(re.findall(r'\\b(Double[A-Za-z0-9_]+|BuildDoubleProjectTransformColumns|LoadDouble[A-Za-z0-9_]*|StoreDouble[A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(', source_double)))
# Types/constructors have definitions or are expected struct constructors.
known_types={'Double2','Double3','Double4','Double3x4','DoubleMatrix','DoubleVector'}
unresolved=[n for n in double_calls if n not in source_set and n not in known_types]

print(f'matrix facade mapped wrappers: {len(mapped)}')
print(f'matrix facade missing double wrappers: {len(missing)}')
for f,d in missing:
    print(f'  {f} -> {d}')
print(f'SourceMath double calls from facade: {len(called)}')
print(f'SourceMath missing called implementations: {len(missing_source_calls)}')
for n in missing_source_calls:
    print(f'  {n}')
for backend, count, miss in backend_missing:
    print(f'{backend}: F32 funcs={count}, missing F64 peers={len(miss)}')
    for f,d in miss:
        print(f'  {f} -> {d}')
print(f'targeted SourceMath float->double expected pairs: {len(exp)}')
print(f'targeted SourceMath missing double implementations: {len(source_missing)}')
for f,d in source_missing:
    print(f'  {f} -> {d}')
print(f'double implementation internal call count: {len(double_calls)}')
print(f'double implementation unresolved call names: {len(unresolved)}')
for n in unresolved:
    print(f'  {n}')
